title: Torrezx-Hollow knight totem
body:
Torrezx-Hollow night totem

Español
Reeemplaza el totem de minecraft normal,por una nueva version del personaje
de Hollow knight.

English
Replace the normal Minecraft totem with a new version of the Hollow Knight character.

1.21.11x-1.21.5

Rename in anvil tools (Totem):

-Hollow sword totem

-Hollow broken totem

-Hollow broken sword totem

-Shadow totem

-Shadow sword totem

-Shadow tentacles totem

1.21.4 and older versions-Reemplaza-Replace :
-Totem

Requerimientos-Requirements:
-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
